title: Origins: Mystic's Class Pack
description: A small collection of 20 classes I've made for the Origins Mod.
body:
A small collection of 20 classes I've made for the Origins Mod.
Each class is made to provide players with helpful benefits or unique passives depending on what playstyle they are aiming for.

### V1.0.0+ Classes:

Classes 1-5
- Brute [ These violent warriors forgo shields in favor of the SWING!! ]
- Demolitionist [ As an expert in explosives "We know a thing or two, because we've seen a thing or two." ]
- Diver [ Expert swimmers with years of training and experience. Divers are able to stay in the water for much longer. ]
- Builder [ Building isn't hard to do. The hard part is being good at building. ]
- Camper [ The warmth of the fire will keep you... well, warm. ]
 
Classes 6-10
- Traveler [ Travelers have no time to stop or worry about falling, they must travel. ]
- Spelunker [ While not as efficient as miners, spelunkers are more adept at discovering treasures. ]
- Guard [ Guards are experts at blocking! Yeah, that's about it... ]
- Gladiator [ Gladiators are strong combatants fighting for glory and fame. ]
- "Alchemist" [ "Alchemist" love experimenting with potions... and with their own bodies. ]

Classes 11-15
- Paladin [ A Paladin, a leading champion of the cause, someone you can trust your back too... probably. ]
- Salvager [ See the future Grindstone and you have nothing to worry about. Sadly prophet's Salvager's can't see the full future at all.]
- Fisher [ How much fish will a fisher fish when furiously fishing for fish? ]
- Mirage [ The power of illusions will empower and protect you. ]
- Paraglider [ A Gliding Expert who is used to hitting walls (For fun of course). ]

Classes 16-20
- Jouster [A Jouster is incomplete without their mount. ]
- Berserker [ These even more violent warriors are relentless when attacking. ]
- Pacifist [ Violence is a last year thing! Even if you're hit it doesn't matter right? ]
- Lurker [ Night time enthusiast and sleep disliker. ]
- Cryptic [ Shuffles through class abilities. ]

  
### Added V1.1.0+
Classes 21-#
- Gambler [It's not an addiction! It's... dedication, and I'm still not addicted so it's not gonna happen.]


 

Take a look at the Image Tab for full descriptions of each Class. Including my own version of Nitwit for players who don't want a class.

 

The only dependency the datapack has is the Origins mod. Yes, the Origins Class addon is not needed for the pack to run properly.
